data.description:
Define the canonical workflow file format and a safe parser.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Coordinate-free GitHub-Actions-style `steps:` model (id, type, needs/uses, with, prompt, output_schema/mode).
- [ ] YAML 1.2 Core safe-loader; anchors/merge-keys rejected; pre-parse byte-size cap.
- [ ] schema_version typed as string; stable human IDs; deterministic serialization.
Files: src/rebar/schemas/workflow.schema.json, src/rebar/llm/workflow/schema.py
data.title: WS-B1: Workflow DSL JSON Schema + YAML 1.2 safe-loader/parser
